behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names go.mod, minifiers/config.go, minifiers/minifiers_test.go, the version v2.24.11, the KeepNamespaces value, and the issue #14669 reference with literal x-bind:href and :href strings.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction explicitly states the exact fix: 'Configure the SVG minifier's KeepNamespaces option with the value []string{"", "x-bind"}' and 'Update ... to version v2.24.11', leaving no reasoning to the agent.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert exact literal 'KeepNamespaces: []string{"", "x-bind"}' and exact version string 'v2.24.11'; alternative formatting (e.g., different whitespace, different order) would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests include subprocess calls to go test, go build, go vet, and gofmt which execute the code.

test_not_tautological.reason: The go test subprocess actually runs the new Alpine.js test cases which would fail without the KeepNamespaces fix.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests verify dep update, config change, regression tests, build, vet, and existing tests as described in instruction.md.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are named descriptively (test_go_mod_dependencies_updated, test_config_has_keep_namespaces) with docstrings explaining each.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a Go code fix, not producing structured data.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the exact file minifiers/minifiers_test.go and gives the exact config literal []string{"", "x-bind"}, which eliminates localization work.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch makes localized edits to go.mod, config.go, and minifiers_test.go without full-file rewrites.
